description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of white and light gray walls, with sections of wood paneling adding warmth and texture. Large glass windows and sliding doors open onto a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and shaded patio areas. The front entryway is defined by a paved walkway, flanked by small plants and a prominent wooden door. The layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms along the sides. The house is surrounded by green lawn areas, providing a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roof, wood accents, large windows, and a backyard pool. The design emphasizes open spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a paved path, wooden door, and flanking plants, as well as a glimpse into the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green lawn, wood paneling, and the transition from the paved front to the backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, shaded patio, and large glass doors opening from the house.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the pool, patio furniture, and the connection between the house and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide wooden door, paved walkway, flanking plants, and no porch or overhang.
